doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: No such protocol exists within the State Bar of California's regulatory framework, and the document proposes legal changes that would require legislative action rather than an administrative policy.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The California State Bar has no such "Emergency Access to Justice Protocol," and the document's provisions regarding the unauthorized practice of law contradict established California statutes (B&P Code §6125).
